evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses current clerkMiddleware from @clerk/nextjs/server with createRouteMatcher and auth.protect(); explicitly warns against deprecated authMiddleware. Uses primaryEmailAddress.emailAddress (current). Internally consistent; no version pinned but pattern matches current Clerk API.
evidence.executability: All fenced blocks parse cleanly. middleware.ts, layout.tsx, page.tsx are syntactically valid. Imports resolved. No sandbox-infeasible patterns (no ngrok/brew/sudo). One minor: requires manual Clerk dashboard Google OAuth toggle, but that's expected setup.
evidence.completeness: (a) API key acquisition with dashboard URL+menu path ✓; (b) npm install in bash ✓; (c) .env template with exact names ✓; (d) middleware/server code ✓; (e) frontend layout/pages ✓; (f) test command 'npm run dev' with steps ✓. Env vars listed match those referenced implicitly by SDK.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only one link to dashboard.clerk.com (dashboard, not docs). No official clerk.com/docs URL placed near code. No fabricated URLs.

rubric_notes: Strong playbook; uses current Clerk patterns and explicitly warns about deprecated authMiddleware. Main weakness is lack of official clerk.com/docs URLs near code blocks.
